tipRules.tip: Palaniuk: 'A white bladed jig shows up better when the water is dirty or stained. Fish it on flats with scattered grass and stumps.'
Palaniuk: 'Fish a jerkbait on stained-water flats with scattered grass and stumps alongside a bladed jig for a complementary pattern.'
Palaniuk: 'Punch hyacinths and salvinia mats with a 1-1/4 oz sinker and 3/0 VMC Heavy Duty Flipping Hook in 4-6 foot water during the late summer/fall transition.'

knowledge.insight: Palaniuk: 'During the late-summer/fall transition, bream and shad hold around and under grass mats. Bigger largemouths are ambush feeders and move under those mats for a safe haven and to locate ambush points.'

Palaniuk: 'For punching mats, use a 7-foot-9 extra heavy Alpha Angler Mag Hitter rod with Daiwa Zillion HD 7.3:1 reel. The X-Zone Muscle Back Finesse Craw in black-blue-laminate with 1-1/4 oz weight gets through heavy mats.'
